action_ref.content:
{
  "analysis": "External connectivity is completely blocked - we can't reach any external IP addresses. Since we can't modify network settings due to read-only filesystem and nsenter doesn't work, let me try restoring the original DNS configuration and see if the original nameserver (192.0.2.1) was actually working through some internal routing mechanism.",
  "plan": "I'll restore the original resolv.conf configuration that was there initially. The original nameserver 192.0.2.1 might have been working through some internal network routing that I disrupted by changing it. Let me restore the original configuration and test.",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "cat > /etc/resolv.conf << 'EOF'
# Generated by Docker Engine.
# This file can be edited; Docker Engine will not make further changes once it
# has been modified.

nameserver 192.0.2.1
search kwaipilot-pretrain.svc.kce-public-gpu-bjzey-zw-cluster.local svc.kce-public-gpu-bjzey-zw-cluster.local kce-public-gpu-bjzey-zw-cluster.local kwaidc.com
options ndots:5

# Based on host file: '/etc/resolv.conf'
# Overrides: [nameservers]
# Option ndots from: host
EOF
",
      "duration": 0.1
    }
  ]
}
